calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Records And Register Of Actions
Off Calendar Oct-10-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
LUISA REAGAN, IN PROPRIA PERSONA, (415)431-9870 X-25541, DEFENDANT/MOVING PARTY
NO OTHER APPEARANCES WERE MADE

THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. DEFENDANT LUISA REAGAN'S Motion To Seal Records And Register Of Actions IS DENIED. CRC 2.550 AND 2.551 DO NOT ALLOW THE COURT TO SEAL THESE RECORDS. Prevailing party is to prepare a form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR #8189 (301/PJB/LB)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-14-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-14-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as re-assigned by the PJ. for settlement on the record.
Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: E. Estacio, CSR: Anthony Vaughn.
Nasir Patel, In Propria Persona, present in court.
Luisa Reagan, present w/ counsel Joseph Bravo, Esq.
Terms of the settlement were read into the record as follows:
Defendant Luisa Reagan to vacate the premises of the property located at: 1048 Polk St., Apt. #308, San Francisco, CA, on or before 4/16/05.
Plaintiff will pay the defendant company check in the amount of $750.00.
Defendant to return keys to plaintiff and leave the premises in broom clean condition.
If Defendants fail to vacate, Plaintiff will be entitled to the entry of Judgment against Defendants upon as Ex Parte application and declaration with 24-hour notice to Defendants.
Defendant signed release of known and unknown claims.
Forfeiture of the rental agreement.
Exchange of keys and check will take place at 2 PM on 4/18/05 at the above address. Check in the amount of $750.00 will be made out to defendant Luisa Reagan.
Parties agreed to terms of the settlement in open court.
The Court deemed the matter settled and trial date is vacated.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2005 Off Calendar
